metadata.description: Tools for turning scientific models into interactive, explorable GUIs.

plugins.name: model-scope
plugins.description: Build a self-contained, schema-driven web GUI that visualises ANY parameterised stochastic / dynamical model trial-by-trial: watch one trial's trajectory unfold, drop a count into the outcome histogram when it resolves, repeat n times for the distribution — with a slider per parameter and optional 2-D phase-plane + energy-landscape views. Generalises the Bogacz-2006 decision-model simulator to any model.
